div.div: Comedy, Sci-Fi, Slice of Life, Supernatural

The comedy manga centers around a super-powered girl named Hina and Nitta, a young member of the yakuza. Hina suddenly appears in Nitta's room and threatens him with her extraordinary powers. However, they end up living together.
(Source: Anime News Network)

Tomboy Tomo couldn’t have picked a more awkward high school crush ’cause it’s on her childhood friend, Junichiro, but he only sees her as one of the guys. Despite her pretty looks and signals, nothing gets through to this meathead! Will Junichiro ever realize Tomo’s into him and see her for the cutesy girl she actually is?!
(Source: Crunchyroll)

With the highest kaiju-emergence rates in the world, Japan is no stranger to attack by deadly monsters. Enter the Japan Defense Force, a military organization tasked with the neutralization of kaiju. Kafka Hibino, a kaiju-corpse cleanup man, has always dreamed of joining the force. But when he gets another shot at achieving his childhood dream, he undergoes an unexpected transformation. How can he fight kaiju now that he’s become one himself?!
(Source: VIZ Media)

You’ve got the raw talent. Or you’re the underdog. But do you have the heart? Do you have what it takes? Let’s see what you’re made of. The real fight starts now! (Source: WEBTOON) Note: Includes 30 extra chapters.

At the age of eight, I-Jin Yu lost his parents in a plane crash and became stranded in a foreign land, forced to become a child mercenary in order to stay alive. He returns home ten years later to be reunited with his family in Korea, where food and shelter are plenty and everything seems peaceful. But I-Jin will soon learn that life as a teenager is a whole other feat of survival. With only one year of high school left, I-Jin must master new tactics to maneuver his way around the schoolhouse battleground. Can he survive a year of high school? Or rather, will the school be able to survive him?
(Source: WEBTOON)

Back then, Dok-Ja had no idea. He had no idea his favorite web novel 'Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse' was going to come to life, and that he would become the only person to know how the world was going to end. He also had no idea he would end up becoming the protagonist of this novel-turned-reality. Now, Dok-Ja will go on a journey to change the course of the story and save humankind once and for all.
(Source: WEBTOON, edited)
Ookami wa Tsuki ni Koi wo Suru

Ryuna Kamikawa is the beautiful and perfect-acting student council president. When she gets angry at her lazy vice-president, Yugi Tsukiyama, he likes to tease her by calling "wolf-senpai."

The two are like the light and dark sides of the moon, total opposites who don't get along. Until one day, when Tsukiyama discovers the hidden side of "Wolf Senpai" through his secret part-time job...?

This is the start of a love story between two people with hidden identities!

(Source: Ura Sunday, translated)

Ryugeom Cheok, a loyal Goryeo warrior, throws himself off a cliff with his enemy to protect his master—only to be frozen in ice for 900 years. Awakened in the modern era, the greatest swordsman of Goryeo begins his journey of vengeance… (Source: WEBTOON)
Boku to Gal ga Fuufu ni Naru made

Saku Kanakura was a boy born into a poor household. He studied hard and managed to pass the exam to an excellent high school, but it soon turned out that his parents were in debt! When it was time to pay the debt off, a mysterious gal appeared and offered to pay off their debt. A big burden was almost off Kanakura's head, but the gal made a condition in return which stated that—
